Name: Bolstering
Description: When any non-boss enemy dies, its death cry empowers nearby allies, increasing their maximum health and damage by 20%.

Name: Necrotic
Description: All enemies' melee attacks apply a stacking healing reduction effect.

Name: Grievous
Description: Players below 90% health take periodic damage until healed above the threshold.

Name: Tyrannical
Description: Boss enemies have 40% more health and inflict 15% more damage.

Name: Fortified
Description: Non-boss enemies have 20% more health and inflict 30% more damage.

Name: Raging
Description: Enemies deal more damage at low health.

Name: Sanguine
Description: Enemies leave behind a sanguine zone on death.

Name: Volcanic
Description: Volcanic plumes erupt under players who stay at range.
